Off Calendar Jan-08-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCE:
Defendant NAM IL CHO in propria persona 563-9060 and moving party
Daniel Bornstein, Esq. of BORNSTEIN & BORNSTEIN 409-7611 for Plaintiff TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES, INC. opposing party

Mr. Bornstein represented in open court that both sides are working on settlement. Defendant CHO's motion to quash service of summons denied as moot. However, Defendant shall have 5 days leave to answer. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (JJM) Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855
